item.description:
Microverse v0.5.0 A unified system monitoring app for macOS with elegant desktop widgets.

What's Changed
  • ✨ Feature: streamline GitHub Pages workflow for Sparkle release notes
  • ✨ Feature: simplify release notes with direct GitHub link (like most apps)
  • 🐛 Fix: correct YAML syntax for Python heredoc in workflow
  • ✨ Feature: implement expert-recommended Sparkle release notes solution

    Installation 1. Download the DMG file below 2. Open the DMG and drag Microverse to Applications 3. Launch from Applications or Spotlight Requires macOS 11.0 or later
